Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TONY LEI'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled as to both causes of action in the complaint. Both claims are adequately pled. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
